name: holak-teams
description: Two themed Claude Code sub-agent teams: Hephaestus (software delivery, Roman names) and Argus (QA, Greek names). Each is a single-entry-point, hub-and-spoke crew of specialist sub-agents.

plugins.name: hephaestus
plugins.description: Roman-named software-delivery team. One entry point (marcus) decomposes the goal, designs a named team, dispatches BA / dev / management / QA specialists, and synthesises the result. 22 sub-agents, hub-and-spoke.

plugins.name: argus
plugins.description: Self-contained Greek-named QA team with explicit runner modes, versioned QA contracts, capability preflight, deny-by-default authorization, and deterministic parallel coordination.
